title: 天翔けるウマ娘　メジロマックイーン

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh, she's back!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: McQueen, great work out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You've all come back to meet me? I'm touched.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Second place—you were so close! 'Twas a great race!
choice_data_list:
Everyone out there today was in absolute top
form.

Everyone out there today was in absolute top
form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, there is no doubt about that. I could tell that everyone had
prepared well, and their focus was laser-sharp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This time, I was simply beaten fair and square.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You seem quite pleased, considering.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This race was nothing if not fruitful. I have a clear idea of what I need
to improve on for next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Every race is a learning experience. Also...

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Also?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Unlike at the Japan Cup, I simply felt satisfied with myself and my
running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I was able to convert all of your expectations into power.

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Give it your all at the next one too, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Lookin' forward to it, ace!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I already know that it's going to be a fabulous race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I intend to show you exactly what an ace is capable of.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, I think we're done here. I heard Trainer's got a huge feast
lined up for us!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sure do! I even put aside some of my last paycheck just for this!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sure do! I even put aside some of my last paycheck just for this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, did you now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: As you know, I was watching how much I ate in preparation for this race. I am quite famished.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever dined together with so many hungry Umamusume at
once?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, we should totally invite Oguri and Ryan too!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: W-wait a minute! My wallet's definitely not that full!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: W-wait a minute! My wallet's definitely not that full!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sorry, no takebacks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A year after Oguri Cap's miraculous Arima Kinen performance... Team
Sirius begins yet another new chapter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though they may have stumbled a bit along the way, the team's
rookie ace and rookie trainer never stopped running forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is still much room to grow before Sirius reaches the same
heights as time past...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the passion inherited from the previous generation is firmly
woven into the fabric of the team.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's time, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You can do it, ace! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I heard that if you can pull off this double-W, there's a pile of sweets
waitin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh! Is that true?!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You shouldn't have said that. How will she concentrate now?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I mean, I thought that would get her fired up. Did it backfire?

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, ace! Get your mind back on the course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, you're absolutely right! The course... Focus on the... dessert
course...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: McQueen, your rival today is the undefeated Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: McQueen, your rival today is the undefeated Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the way she's raced so far, she's a force to be reckoned
with. And to back that up, she's also today's favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: But I know that in the end, you'll cross that finish line first!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: But I know that in the end, you'll cross that finish line first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Yes, I should think so. With all of your support as my tailwind,
I feel ready to soar any distance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen! Mejiro McQueen! She extends her lead to three
lengths!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen crosses the finish! She is the first Umamusume in
history to ever achieve two consecutive victories at the spring Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sob... I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Our ace is just the best...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will continue to run—to carry your dreams onward!
